calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-21-2018 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Enforcing Terms Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Scott Stillman, Esq. 415-421-9292 of McGuinn, Hillsman, & Palefsky for Plaintiff.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT JENNIFER JEANSONNE'S Motion For An Order Enforcing Terms Of Settlement Agreement.

Plaintiff and cross-defendant Jennifer Jeansonne's motion for order enforcing terms of settlement agreement is granted. No opposition filed and defendant Renato Libric filed a notice of non-opposition.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned order and judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Not Reported. =(302/HK)

Matthew Cebrian'S, Of The Dhillon Law Group'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel For Defendant'S Bouxtie,Inc And Renato Libric,
Off Calendar Jul-05-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Atty. Ravdeep S. Grewal of the Dhillon Law Group, Inc., Tel. No. 1-415-433-1700,
Moving party;
No other appearances on the matter.


RULING - The Dhillon Law Group's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel For the Defendants Bouxtie,Inc And Renato Libric is granted on the condition that a proof of service on the order be filed and a Non-opposition to the Motion to reinforce the Settlement Agreement also be filed with the court. 2 Orders signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torrano, CSR # 8600 =(302/HEK)

Matthew Cebrian'S, Of The Dhillon Law Group'S Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel For Defendant'S Bouxtie,Inc And Renato Libric,
Off Calendar Jul-03-2018 Continued To Jul-05-18 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Atty. Ravdeep S. grewal of the Dhillon Law Group, Tel. No. 1-415-433-1700,
for the Moving party;
No other appearances on the matter.

RULING- The Dhillon Law Group's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel For Defendants Bouxtie,Inc And Renato Libric is continued to July 5, 2018 at 11:00 a.m. in order for Mr. Grewal to find out the position of his client regarding this motion. An ex-parte application will also be heard on July 5 regarding the extension of time to file an Opposition to the Motion for an order enforcing the terms of the settlement agreement to be heard on July 18, 2018. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torrano, CSR # 8600 =(302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-24-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-17-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANTS BOUXTIE, INC. and RENATO LIBRIC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. A first amended complaint was filed December 19, 2017. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.
